KXMLBFTGAME-26JUL121200ALNL-AL.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
KXMLBFTGAME-26JUL121200ALNL-AL.rules_primary: If the American League wins the Pro Baseball Futures Game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXMLBFTGAME-26JUL121200ALNL-AL.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Pro Baseball Futures Game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
